'''Whistler''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] who designed and built [[Whistler's Whirlpool Tapcafe]]. He designed the [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] around a whirlpool, hoping for an exciting view, while still maintaining a luxurious décor. The atmosphere, however, tended to lean towards cool and damp, and customers eventually stopped coming, forcing Whistler to shut down.

{{Char-stub}}
